---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: feature
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing today? Describe the use case, not just the solution.

## Proposed behavior

What you'd like TangleBrain to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is preferable.

## Scope notes

- Does this fit the **config-driven** model (a roster/settings change), or does it need new code in
  an adapter / the router?
- Any impact on the opt-in / bring-your-own-key posture (see [DISCLAIMER.md](../../DISCLAIMER.md))?

## Additional context

Anything else — links, examples, related issues.
